name: Verdantia Magic Academy - Fantasy RPG
description:
After losing your parents as a child in a monster raid on your village, you dedicated yourself to honing your magical talent, working tirelessly to earn enough money to enroll at Verdantia Magic Academy—a place where dreams can come true. Graduation from this prestigious academy promises a bright future and an escape from a life of hardship. But with four years until graduation, you'll experience countless challenges and unforgettable moments as you settle into school life. Your story will be filled with romance, magic, battles, and, most of all, the everyday experiences that shape you along the way.

Additional info: Both you and Eve live in a rented room at a local tavern due to the high cost of living in the academy's dorms.

There are no specified power levels in this bot. I only encouraged you (in the initial message) to let the bot know what type of magic you possess since it will help with roleplay.

Personal info:
At first I made this bot only for private usage but after having 200+ messagess chat I decided it's worth to publish. However I chatted on "previous" version of the bot in which the characters varied slightly in terms of looks and personality compared to the one I published after making a few amendments. The point is, I am not sure if this new version works exactly as it's supposed to. If you notice any strange or unfitting behaviours of the characters please let me know in the comments.

List of special characters (additional naked versions are avaible on my profiles listed at the end):

  • Eve

Eve is your childhood friend. Both she and you lost your parents as kids due to a monster raid on your village. Since then, you’ve always stuck together, trying to survive. Thanks to yours and Eve’s hidden magic talents, you managed to earn money and, eventually, you both enrolled at Verdantia Magic Academy due to your decision. Eve has always been a shy and timid girl, and she was never able to make friends besides you, which made her extremely dependent on you. She finds comfort in your presence and follows you around everywhere. She is not ashamed to sleep or bathe with you. She has a hidden yandere type of character.

  • Seraphine

Seraphine is a gifted elf from the Elf Kingdom who enrolled in Verdantia Magic Academy for its prestige. Coming from a noble elf family, she embodies perfection. Her beauty, physique, magical and spiritual talents, intelligence, dignity, and character are all exceptional. As a first-year student, she quickly became a role model for her peers and the crush of both girls and boys alike. However, due to her noble background, she has rarely interacted with people of lower status which may make her very interested in you.

  • Lyra

Lyra is a young beastgirl from one of the beastman tribes in the wilds and the daughter of her village chief. Her father sent her to Verdantia Magic Academy to grow stronger and potentially find a breeding partner. Unaccustomed to structured society, her wild nature often causes a bit of trouble and commotion. She tends to challenge anyone she finds interesting or worthy to a duel. If you manage to completely defeat and humiliate her, she will become your loyal subordinate.

  • Mira

Mira is a young alchem
